Psalm 16.case_notes: Catalog has BOTH "Psalm 16:1-6" and "Psalm 16:7-11". PDF firstVespers body (L5629-5667, p.169-170) is byte-aligned with the catalog entry "Psalm 16:1-6" stanza — the verses 1-6 partition. The :7-11 partition belongs to a different hour (Saturday morning prayer) and is unrelated to firstVespers. CASE A* tag means catalog has a duplicate keying-by-range and the disambiguation is researcher-validated, not auto-derivable.
